overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in a red leather jacket walking through a rainy urban night environment. The scene features wet pavement reflections, elevated train tracks, street lamps, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a downtown setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated railway with red awnings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under elevated tracks, passing by storefronts with red awnings

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement billboard displaying mortgage information with blue background
building facade with distinctive red and white striped awnings over windows
decorative black metal street lamp with multiple spherical lights
metal railway structure running overhead with support columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked sidewalk beneath elevated train tracks, passing a illuminated mortgage billboard and storefronts with red awnings. The wet pavement reflects the street lamps and building lights in the heavy rain.

events.description: character turns right and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk
taxi cab passes by on the right as character crosses the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while navigating around pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: taxi cab driving along the street next to the crosswalk

entered.detail: large building with illuminated CSI signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection and crosses the street at the crosswalk, moving from the sheltered sidewalk to the exposed intersection. A taxi passes by on the right as pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the crossing beneath the elevated tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with bus stop under elevated tracks

events.description: character passes the mortgage billboard now on the left side while walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk, approaching the mortgage billboard from the return direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: same illuminated billboard now visible from the opposite side of the street
glass and metal bus shelter with illuminated advertisement panels

segments.scene_description: Walking on the opposite side of the street, the character approaches the mortgage billboard again, now visible on the left. The scene includes a bus stop shelter and the CSI building facade while remaining under the elevated tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk continuing past bus stop

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the mortgage billboard and bus stop, heading deeper into the urban environment

segments.scene_description: The character passes the mortgage billboard and bus stop, continuing along the rain-soaked sidewalk. The elevated tracks remain overhead as the character walks past ornate street lamps and building facades in the quiet, rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched urban corridor that shifts from a sheltered sidewalk to an exposed city intersection and back. It begins with the character walking beneath elevated train tracks, passing red-awning storefronts and an illuminated mortgage billboard while the wet pavement reflects the surrounding city lights. As the character reaches a crosswalk, the camera moves from the covered walkway into the open intersection, weaving through pedestrians with umbrellas as a taxi passes by. The scene then shifts to the opposite side of the street, where the camera tracks past a bus stop shelter and the CSI building facade. Finally, the movement continues past the mortgage billboard once more, gliding along the rain-soaked sidewalk beneath the overhead tracks and ornate street lamps into the quiet night.
